pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to provide OpenAPI documentation support compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation in tests.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services in tests.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues or legacy code requirements.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin with fork node settings to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven JAR plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and explicit sections for better readability and maintenance.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base Docker image from a Maven-bundled JDK 11 image to a standalone Liberica JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install Maven manually since the new base image does not include it.
Install Node.js via nvm to replace the previous NodeSource setup script.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application within the Docker image.
Define the entrypoint to run the packaged JAR file instead of starting a bash shell.
Copy application source, frontend, and configuration files into the image for the build step.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the old project README with a new template-based README for a specific team assignment, including updated instructions, version info, and application overview.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced entire README.md content with new template structure

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect the new project identity.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Resolve a merge conflict in .gitignore by selecting the correct ignore patterns for test coverage and storybook logs.
frontend/.gitignore.human_impl: Removed conflict markers and kept /.nyc_output and build-storybook.log patterns.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add ignore pattern for nyc test coverage output directory.
Add ignore pattern for stryker mutation testing temporary files.
Add ignore pattern for storybook log files.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Convert the Storybook configuration from CommonJS module.exports to ES Module export default syntax.
Add JSDoc type annotation for the Storybook configuration object to support TypeScript checking.
Update glob patterns for stories to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove legacy .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the official Storybook onboarding addon to the configuration.
Add the Chromatic visual testing addon to the configuration.
Add the interactions addon for user flow testing to the configuration.
Explicitly define the React Webpack 5 framework in the configuration object.
Configure static directories to serve public assets in Storybook.
Remove the custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to deprecation or migration to standard Storybook error handling.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.human_impl: Removed webpackFinal function and WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning import

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Removed import for react-bootstrap-table-next CSS which is no longer used in the project.
Added import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Added imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Added import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Configured and initialized Mock Service Worker with dynamic URL handling for localhost vs GitHub Pages.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Added logic to determine `mockServiceWorkerUrl` and called `initialize({ serviceWorker: { url: mockServiceWorkerUrl } })`

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Wrapped Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications in the preview.
Refactored preview configuration to use the modern `preview` object export with parameters and loaders.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: Replaced `export const parameters` with `const preview = { parameters: { controls: ... }, loaders: [mswLoader] }` and `export default preview`

frontend/jsconfig.json.general_idea: Changed baseUrl from './src' to 'src' to align with standard path resolution conventions.
Added an include directive to explicitly specify the source directory for the JavaScript language service.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Upgrade package-lock.json from lockfileVersion 1 to 3 to align with modern npm versions and improve dependency resolution.
Update @babel/core and related Babel packages to newer versions compatible with the updated toolchain.
Update @babel/generator to a newer version to support updated code generation features.
Update @babel/code-frame to a newer version for improved error reporting.
Update @babel/compat-data to a newer version for accurate browser compatibility data.
Update semver dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update convert-source-map dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update json5 dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update gensync dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update debug dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update jsesc dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/types dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/parser dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/traverse dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/template dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/helpers dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/helper-module-transforms dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/helper-compilation-targets dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @babel/highlight dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update picocolors dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @jridgewell/gen-mapping dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
Update @jridgewell/trace-mapping dependency within Babel packages to a newer version.
